overall.description: First-person exploration of a geothermal wilderness area in a video game, featuring steaming hot springs, rocky snow-dusted terrain, and moody overcast skies. The player character traverses from a poolside area up a mountain slope and descends into a misty geothermal field with active steam vents.

events.description: begins ascending away from the water's edge onto the rocky slope

agents.ego_description: walking along the geothermal pool, observing steam rising from the water surface

entered.detail: hot spring pool with steaming water and rocky edges
tall geothermal steam vent rising from the ground
rocky shoreline along the pool edge
tall evergreen pine tree against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the edge of a geothermal hot spring pool with steam rising from the water. The camera moves forward along the rocky shore, passing a tall steam vent on the left while a large pine tree stands silhouetted against the overcast sky on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain slope with patchy snow

events.description: snow patches become visible on the rocky ground as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky slope away from the hot spring, navigating snow-dusted terrain

entered.detail: patch of snow on the rocky ground indicating winter conditions
mountain range visible in the hazy distance
leafless dead tree trunk on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the pool behind, the camera ascends a rocky mountain slope where patches of snow dot the terrain. Distant mountains emerge through the haze ahead while a dead tree stands on the left, and the ground becomes increasingly rugged and elevated.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky highland ridge with distant forest

events.description: steam vents from a lower geothermal area become visible in the distance ahead
begins descending toward the geothermal field below

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky ridge with views of the distant forest and mountain ranges

entered.detail: low scrub vegetation and bushes along the path
cluster of evergreen pine trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera traverses a rocky highland ridge with scrub vegetation and clusters of pine trees. As the path continues, steam vents from a lower geothermal area become visible in the distance, and the terrain begins to slope downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: active geothermal field with steam vents

events.description: enters a dense area with multiple active steam vents obscuring visibility
thick steam cloud temporarily blocks the forward view

agents.ego_description: descending into the geothermal field, navigating between rock formations and active steam vents

entered.detail: multiple geothermal steam vents emitting thick white vapor
second hot spring pool visible through the steam
gnarled dead tree with twisted branches

segments.scene_description: Descending into an active geothermal field, the camera moves between rock formations and multiple steam vents emitting thick vapor. A twisted dead tree stands on the left while another hot spring pool becomes visible through the mist, and steam occasionally obscures the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the edge of a steaming hot spring, ascending a rugged mountain slope before descending into a misty geothermal field. It begins by moving along a rocky shore past a tall steam vent and a silhouetted pine tree under an overcast sky. As the camera leaves the pool behind, the terrain becomes increasingly elevated and rugged, climbing a snow-dusted slope where distant mountains emerge through the haze. The scene then shifts across a rocky highland ridge with scrub vegetation and pine clusters before the path begins to slope downward toward visible plumes of vapor. Finally, the camera descends into an active geothermal field, weaving between rock formations and thick steam vents that occasionally obscure the view of a twisted dead tree and another distant hot spring.
